name: Parag Agrawal
bio: An engineer and executive who served as the CEO of Twitter from November 2021 until his termination in October 2022.
_evidence: He was the CEO of Twitter during the acquisition and was summarily fired by Musk immediately upon the deal's closure.

name: Ned Segal
bio: Former CFO of Twitter who managed the company's financial operations during the turbulent acquisition process.
_evidence: As a top executive, he was directly involved in the financial transition of the company and was fired by Musk upon the acquisition.

name: Vijaya Gadde
bio: A lawyer and executive who served as Twitter's head of legal, policy, and trust and safety.
_evidence: She oversaw Twitter's legal and policy departments and was a primary target of Musk's criticism regarding content moderation, leading to her firing.
